name: Shatar
author: AGP
description: Shatar (Mongolian chess) on an 8x8 board, traditional rules. The Bers (queen, J) moves like a rook or one square diagonally; bishop, rook, knight and king are as in chess; pawns have no double step and promote only to a Bers. The obligatory opening 1.d4 d5 is pre-played. Mate only wins if the final unbroken series of checks contains a shak (a check by bers, rook or knight); a mate from bishop/pawn checks alone is niol, a draw; a mate delivered by the knight alone is forbidden and loses; baring either king (robado) and stalemate are draws. White (player 0) moves first.
